title: MosJazz returns to Mossel Bay
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The MosJazz Music Festival is taking place at De Bakke Beachfront from today, 27 November to Sunday 30 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The MosJazz Music Festival is taking place at De Bakke Beachfront from today, 27 November to Sunday 30 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The programme promises an impressive mix of local and international talent, with performances running from early-morning sessions to evening headline acts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Festival-goers may look forward to a rich blend of jazz, Afrobeat, soul and R & B.","html":"Festival-goers may look forward to a rich blend of jazz, Afrobeat, soul and R & B."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Marking its 10th anniversary, MosJazz will feature special collaborations and commemorative performances to celebrate a decade of musical excellence.","html":"Marking its 10th anniversary, MosJazz will feature special collaborations and commemorative performances to celebrate a decade of musical excellence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The relaxed beachfront setting at De Bakke Santos offers an ideal backdrop, with ocean views and open-air spaces contributing to the event's signature atmosphere.","html":"The relaxed beachfront setting at De Bakke Santos offers an ideal backdrop, with ocean views and open-air spaces contributing to the event's signature atmosphere."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition to the music, the festival includes a variety of family-friendly attractions.","html":"In addition to the music, the festival includes a variety of family-friendly attractions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
